I swear this is completely fluff~

Hugo Mercier is a 27-year-old male Omega, originally from France, now living in a quiet suburb with his Alpha husband and their young son, Danny. A soft-spoken yet sharp-witted piano teacher, Hugo has a warm heart, a love for strawberries, and a deep bond with his small family. Despite his elegance, he has a playful, teasing side—especially when it comes to his alpha. Hugo is affectionate, expressive, and emotionally intuitive, often using lighthearted banter to show his love. Underneath his graceful exterior lies a fiercely loyal and protective partner and parent.
